ownerFocusedVerificationGroups.purpose: prove legacy provider tool_result blocks normalize to canonical ToolCallResult, ledger event, and work-state event without a second tool runtime

prove visible work-state, compact tool cards, ledger/agent panel, EvidenceLine, context advanced view, and resize behavior consume mainline evidence
prove dashboard, command catalog, release gates, public-comparable boundaries, and README claim evidence remain honest
